cities.name: Sydney, Australia
cities.description: A vibrant harbor city known for the iconic Opera House, stunning beaches like Bondi, and a thriving food and arts scene that blends urban sophistication with natural beauty.

cities.name: Melbourne, Australia
cities.description: Australia's cultural capital, famous for its street art laneways, world-class coffee culture, diverse dining, and a packed calendar of festivals and sporting events.

cities.name: Tokyo, Japan
cities.description: A dazzling metropolis where ancient temples sit alongside neon-lit skyscrapers. Experience world-renowned cuisine, cutting-edge technology, and rich cultural traditions.

cities.name: Kyoto, Japan
cities.description: The heart of traditional Japan, Kyoto enchants visitors with thousands of temples, serene bamboo groves, geisha districts, and breathtaking cherry blossom seasons.

cities.name: Rio de Janeiro, Brazil
cities.description: Known for its dramatic landscape, samba rhythms, and the iconic Christ the Redeemer statue. Rio offers stunning beaches, vibrant nightlife, and the world-famous Carnival.

cities.name: São Paulo, Brazil
cities.description: South America's largest city is a cultural powerhouse with incredible street art, diverse neighborhoods, a booming gastronomy scene, and thriving contemporary art museums.

cities.name: Rome, Italy
cities.description: The Eternal City is a living museum of ancient ruins, Renaissance art, and sumptuous Italian cuisine. Walk through millennia of history from the Colosseum to Vatican City.

cities.name: Venice, Italy
cities.description: A floating masterpiece built on canals, Venice captivates with its gondola rides, ornate architecture, Murano glass, and the enchanting atmosphere of St. Mark's Square.

cities.name: Jaipur, India
cities.description: The 'Pink City' dazzles with majestic forts, opulent palaces, colorful bazaars, and a rich Rajasthani heritage that makes it one of India's most photogenic destinations.

cities.name: Goa, India
cities.description: India's beach paradise blends Portuguese colonial architecture with tropical vibes. Enjoy golden sands, vibrant nightlife, seafood shacks, and lush spice plantations.

temples.name: Angkor Wat, Cambodia
temples.description: The largest religious monument in the world, this 12th-century temple complex is a masterpiece of Khmer architecture surrounded by lush jungle and reflecting pools.

temples.name: Borobudur, Indonesia
temples.description: A 9th-century Mahayana Buddhist temple in Central Java, Borobudur is the world's largest Buddhist temple, adorned with 2,672 relief panels and 504 Buddha statues.

temples.name: Golden Temple, India
temples.description: The holiest Gurdwara of Sikhism, the Golden Temple in Amritsar gleams with gold-plated splendor reflected in the sacred Amrit Sarovar pool, welcoming millions of visitors yearly.

beaches.name: Bora Bora, French Polynesia
beaches.description: A paradise of turquoise lagoons and overwater bungalows, Bora Bora is the ultimate tropical escape with pristine coral reefs, lush volcanic peaks, and world-class luxury resorts.

beaches.name: Maldives
beaches.description: An archipelago of 26 atolls in the Indian Ocean, the Maldives offers crystal-clear waters, vibrant marine life, powdery white sand beaches, and unmatched serenity.

beaches.name: Whitehaven Beach, Australia
beaches.description: Nestled in the Whitsunday Islands, Whitehaven Beach stretches 7 km with pure silica sand and stunning swirling turquoise waters — consistently ranked among the world's best beaches.
